notes: Anime absolute numbering emits one absolute episode and no season episodes.
Decimal absolute episode marks special and deliberately leaves both episode arrays empty.
Repeated absolute captures expand inclusively from first to last.
Compact 103 naming splits season one from episode three.
Descending range rejects the range rule, then a later single-episode rule consumes the first endpoint.
Word-number Part syntax defaults to season one and marks miniseries.
XofY miniseries syntax captures X as the episode and defaults to season one.
Multi-season capture sets first season, isMultiSeason, fullSeason, and SeasonPack.
Single SxxExx input without a series title emits an empty seriesTitle rather than null.
Anime OVA branch sets special with Unknown release type.
Season part sets isPartialSeason without FullSeason or a public part number.
Password plus yEnc obfuscation causes episode parsing to fail closed.
Hyphenated episode endpoints expand to every intervening episode.
Repeated episode named captures expand the inclusive first-to-last range.
Repeated SxxExx groups collect episodes from multiple matches.
Repeated x-style season/episode groups collect multiple episodes.
Season 01 Episode 03 is consumed by the earlier season-pack rule, pinning legacy rule order.
Season-only release sets fullSeason and SeasonPack release type.
A full-season match containing Special is rewritten to special and loses SeasonPack release type.
Split-episode suffix is accepted while the public response exposes the single episode contract.
German-only DL adds Original after German.
German-only ML adds Original and English in legacy order.
Full-word, case-sensitive, case-insensitive, and Unicode language passes retain stable first-occurrence ordering.
AKA movie parsing preserves the combined and split title order.

request.body: {"title":"Amelie AKA Le Fabuleux Destin d Amelie 2001 FRENCH 1080p BluRay-QxR","type":"movie"}

response.body: {"title":"Amelie AKA Le Fabuleux Destin d Amelie 2001 FRENCH 1080p BluRay-QxR","type":"movie","source":"Bluray","resolution":1080,"modifier":"None","revision":{"version":1,"real":0,"isRepack":false},"languages":["French"],"releaseGroup":"QxR","movieTitles":["Amelie AKA Le Fabuleux Destin d Amelie","Amelie","Le Fabuleux Destin d Amelie"],"year":2001,"edition":null,"imdbId":null,"tmdbId":0,"hardcodedSubs":null,"releaseHash":null,"episode":null}

movieTitles: Amelie AKA Le Fabuleux Destin d Amelie
decodedBody.title: Amelie AKA Le Fabuleux Destin d Amelie 2001 FRENCH 1080p BluRay-QxR

notes: Anime-bracketed movie branch with subgroup and trailing hash-shaped metadata.
MD5-shaped obfuscated movie name is rejected by title parsing while the HTTP response remains successful.
Normal movie title, year, quality, and standard release-group branch.
Camera source branch retains independently parsed resolution.
DVDRip branch forces DVD source and 480p resolution.
RawHD early return preserves Unknown source with parsed resolution.
Regional DVD branch forces resolution and modifier.
Repeated REAL captures plus REPACK2 and PROPER establish revision precedence and counts.
DVD screener branch forces source, resolution, and modifier.
Telecine source branch.
Telesync source branch.
Workprint source branch.
Episode-shaped group is rejected while episode parsing still succeeds.
Known exception group is recognized without a standard dash suffix.
Numeric-only standard group is rejected.
Obfuscation suffix cleanup reveals the preceding real release group.
